# Quilliam Digital
> AI automation agency for UK small businesses

> Full version: https://quilliamdigital.com/llms-full.txt
> Last updated: 2026-04-05

## About
Quilliam Digital is an AI automation agency based in Cornwall, UK, founded by Levi Quilliam. We help small businesses implement practical AI solutions to save time and win more customers. We focus exclusively on small businesses with 1-50 employees, offering hands-on AI training, custom workflow automation, and complete digital services. Paid automation packages start from £500.

## Services
- AI Training: Hands-on workshops for ChatGPT, Claude, and AI tools. In-person or remote, 1-to-1 or group sessions. Free entry point.
- AI Automation: Custom workflow automation, AI receptionists, review management, automated quoting, invoicing, and customer follow-ups. Core service.
- Digital Services: Websites, SEO, Google Business Profile management, booking systems and hosting. Full package.

## How It Works — The AI Audit
1. We Audit: We look at how your business actually runs. Where is the repetitive work? Where are you losing customers?
2. We Build: We pick the highest-impact automation and set it up.
3. You Win: You get hours back. Your customers get faster responses. Your business runs smoother.
